title: 案例复盘：OpenAI 案例线索
original_title: From open source hits to OpenAI
summary: This week I'm talking with Max Stoiber, currently working on ChatGPT's plugin directory and app platform at OpenAI. We discuss the hundreds of open source projects nobody remembers alongside the big ones like react-boilerplate and styled-components, how Spectrum became part of GitHub and eventually helped shape GitHub Discussions, the founder growth that came from building Stellate, the GraphQL cache that turned into a dual acquisition by Shopify and The Guild, and why ChatGPT apps feel like a new surface for software.
source_category_title: AI 工具与开发者平台
reader_hook: 这条线索有具体项目或案例，可以拆哪些条件可复制，哪些只是别人自己的局。
why_now: 来自本批次稳定公开源，适合先进入 Radar 观察。
reason: 命中老花主线关键词，且来源可复查。
collection_fit: 部分符合收集原则：可以进入简报观察，但证据链或读者入口还不够完整。
investigation_direction: 优先追项目原始页面、代码仓库、作者复盘、收入/增长证据和不可复制条件。
uncertainty_flags: 尚未抓取正文外的补充证据。
尚未形成多源交叉验证。
当前仅适合简报观察，不宜写成深度结论。
